title: Candace Owens' Erika Kirk criticism takes surprising turn after controversial comments about her husband George Farmer
summary_full: Candace Owens is facing fresh online scrutiny after comments about her husband, George Farmer, overshadowed her latest criticism of Erika Kirk. While questioning reports about Charlie and Erika Kirk's close communication, Owens said, “I don’t know what George does every day. I’m in my basement all day.” The remark sparked debate online, with many arguing it revealed more about her own marriage than her ongoing criticism of Erika Kirk.
